scripts.contracts:deploy: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && cd apps/contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url "${SEPOLIA_RPC_URL:-https://ethereum-sepolia-rpc.publicnode.com}" --broadcast'
scripts.contracts:deploy-escrow: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && cd apps/contracts && forge script script/DeployEscrow.s.sol --rpc-url "${SEPOLIA_RPC_URL:-https://ethereum-sepolia-rpc.publicnode.com}" --broadcast'
